Why CogniFocus Uses a Goblin Companion Instead of a Plain Timer

CogniFocus uses a reactive companion because focus apps work better when they notice drift, respond in the moment, and help you recover quickly.

May 26, 2026 | 7 min read

How to Stay Focused at Work and Stop Getting Distracted

The average person loses nearly half an hour of deep focus after a single interruption. Learn the structural changes, not willpower tricks, that protect your attention and help you get your best work done.
